case_title: ALEGRE, LAWRENCE vs. FITTS, GARY A. et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-11-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-11-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND AS TO WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO PROSECUTE CASE. (PLAINTIFF WAS NOTIFIED OF THE 8/11/95 HEARING WHEN HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD MADE A MOTION TO WITHDRAW FROM THE CASE, AND FILED THE ORDER ON 7/26/95) HEARING SET FOR SEP-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF JUL-19-1995, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLAINTIFF COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER WITH ADMONITIONS INCLUDING: 1) STATUS CONFERENCE DATE; 2) REPRESENTING SELF; 3) SANCTIONS CONSEQUENCES; 4) LEGAL CONSEQUENCES.

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-11-1995, CONTINUED TO OCT-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FILING OF A PROOF A SERVICE, TO FILE A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, ETC; AND FOR A CASE STATUS REPORT. (PLAINTIFF TO GIVE A COPY OF THIS NOTICE TO HIS NEW ATTORNEY) NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEGRE, LAWRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT FITTS, GARY A. DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-12-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-13-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-24-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-12-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-12-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-12-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-12-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-12-1995 CONTINUED FROM JUN-12-1995 TO JUL-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-12-1995, CONTINUED TO AUG-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 POS, STAT. CONF. STATEMENT; PLTF'S ATTY. TO NOTIFY DEFT. IF MOTION TO W/DRAW OF ATTY. OF RECORD IS GRANTED. PLTF. IS TO APPEAR IF MOTION IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS STAYED IF PLTF. OR PLTF'S ATTY. APPEARS AT NEXT STAT. CONF. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
LAWRENCE ALEGRE ADDED AS PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER DUE TO MOTION BEING GRANTED FOR HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD TO WITHDRAW. (SYSTEM WAS NOT UPDATED TO REFLECT PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER)

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-13-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-13-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), $100 SANCTIONS IS IMPOSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR TODAY, PAYABLE TO COURT BY 12/5/95. COURT MAY DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR DEC-05-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEGRE, LAWRENCE HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS PLTF'S ATTORNEY
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (RE WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY) MAILED TO MR LAURENCE ALEGRE ON 7-27-95 FILED BY BRYANT H BYRNES

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-11-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-11-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-13-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
